summary: Regional Relations Panel testing completed. Backend API returns 20 countries grouped by Neighbor/GCC/Major/EU with relationship intel, visa info, and sources. Trade data (exports/imports/remittances) is currently NULL due to SBP EasyData API rate limiting (429 Too Many Requests). Frontend correctly handles null trade data by showing '--' and 'No trend data'. All 21 backend tests pass. All 10 frontend UI tests pass.

critical.issue: Trade data (exports/imports/remittances) returns NULL for all 20 countries due to SBP EasyData API rate limiting (429 Too Many Requests). The _fetch_country_series_mapping function doesn't persist cache to disk, so when API is rate-limited, empty mapping is returned.
critical.root_cause: SBP_COUNTRY_SERIES_CACHE is in-memory only. When SBP API returns 429, the cache is empty and returns empty mapping. Need to persist this cache to disk like other caches (using persist_cache_entry/restore_cache_entry pattern).
critical.suggested_fix: Add disk persistence for SBP_COUNTRY_SERIES_CACHE similar to how other caches use persist_cache_entry() and restore_cache_entry() functions

passed_tests: GET /api/regional returns HTTP 200
GET /api/regional-relations returns HTTP 200
Response has valid JSON structure with data.countries and data.updated
Returns exactly 20 countries
Countries grouped correctly: Neighbor, GCC, Major, EU
Neighbor group has: India, Afghanistan, Iran, China
GCC group has: Saudi Arabia, UAE-Abu Dhabi, UAE-Dubai, Qatar, Kuwait, Bahrain, Oman
Major group has: United States, United Kingdom
EU group has: European Union, Germany, Netherlands, France, Spain, Italy, Belgium
All 20 countries have required fields: code, name, flag, group, status, tag, highlights, visa, sources, trade
Countries have visa information with status and notes
Countries have source links with title and url
Trade structure present (exports/imports/remittances keys exist)
Endpoint responds within 60 seconds
Regional Panel loads without getting stuck in loading spinner
Country sidebar renders all 20 countries
Groups displayed: Neighbor, GCC, Major, EU
Clicking countries updates detail panel correctly
Trade cards show '--' for null data (correct handling)
Visa & Travel section displays
Sources panel opens/closes correctly
Relationship highlights display
Status badges and tag chips display
Sidebar and detail panel scrolling works
action_items: HIGH PRIORITY: Fix SBP trade data caching - add disk persistence for SBP_COUNTRY_SERIES_CACHE to handle API rate limiting (429 errors). Use the existing persist_cache_entry/restore_cache_entry pattern.
The _fetch_country_series_mapping function at line ~3875 needs to persist mapping to disk when successfully fetched, and restore from disk when API is rate-limited
critical_code_review_comments: SBP_COUNTRY_SERIES_CACHE (line 794-798) is in-memory only, unlike other caches that use persist_cache_entry(). When SBP API returns 429, trade data becomes unavailable.
The _fetch_country_trade_bundle function (line 3998) calls _fetch_country_series_mapping 3 times per country (60 API calls for 20 countries), which triggers rate limiting.
Consider caching the entire regional_relations response to disk to avoid repeated API calls
context_for_next_testing_agent: Regional Relations Panel UI is fully functional. Backend endpoint /api/regional returns 20 countries with relationship intel, visa info, and sources. CRITICAL: Trade data (exports/imports/remittances) is NULL due to SBP API rate limiting. The SBP_COUNTRY_SERIES_CACHE needs disk persistence. Frontend correctly handles null trade data by showing '--'. All tests pass but trade data feature needs backend fix.

regional_api.trade_data_status: NULL due to SBP API rate limiting (429)

regional_panel_ui.scrolling: Working for both sidebar and detail

rca_of_the_issue.issue: Trade data (exports/imports/remittances) is NULL for all countries
rca_of_the_issue.root_cause: SBP EasyData API returns 429 Too Many Requests. The _fetch_country_series_mapping function makes API calls to fetch series metadata, but when rate-limited, returns empty mapping because SBP_COUNTRY_SERIES_CACHE is in-memory only.
reproduction_steps: 2. Backend calls _fetch_country_trade_bundle for each of 20 countries
3. Each call triggers 3 API requests to SBP (exports, imports, remittances metadata)
4. SBP API returns 429 Too Many Requests
6. Trade data becomes NULL for all countries
rca_of_the_issue.mitigation: Add disk persistence for SBP_COUNTRY_SERIES_CACHE using persist_cache_entry/restore_cache_entry pattern. Also consider caching the entire regional_relations response.
